zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Touchet Lord Audley於1371年4月23日出生在英國斯塔福爾奧德利時，他的父親Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley21歲，母親Margery de Mortimer19歲。他於1398年與Elizabeth de Stafford在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1408年12月19日在他的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Touchet Lord Audley于1371年4月23日出生在英国斯塔福爾奧德利时，他的父亲Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley21岁，母亲Margery de Mortimer19岁。他于1398年与Elizabeth de Stafford在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1408年12月19日在他的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Touchet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anastasie, Denys, Evest, Minos, Rodolph, Vernice.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by a small grove, from a diminutive of Old French toche ‘grove’.
History: René Touchet from Thorigné-d'Anjou in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Caillé in Saint-Laurent, Île-de-Montreal, QC, in 1746.

variants.name: Touchette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Collette, Euclide, Henri, Hilaire, Huguette.
Altered form of French Touchet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Touchet Lord Audley was born on 23 April 1371, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley, was 21 and his mother, Margery de Mortimer, was 19. He married Elizabeth de Stafford in 1398, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 19 December 1408, in his hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Touchet Lord Audley est né le 23 avril 1371, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margery de Mortimer, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Stafford en 1398, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 décembre 1408, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Touchet Lord Audley am 23. April 1371 in Audley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley 21 und seine Mutter Margery de Mortimer 19. Er hat 1398 in Staffordshire, England Elizabeth de Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Dezember 1408 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Touchet Lord Audley è nato il il 23 aprile 1371 nel Audley, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margery de Mortimer, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Stafford nel 1398, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 dicembre 1408, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Touchet Lord Audleyが1371年4月23日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Touchet Baron of Audleyは21歳，母Margery de Mortimerは19歳であった。1398年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでElizabeth de Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1408年12月19日に故郷で37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Touchet Lord Audley(이)가 1371년 4월 23일 영국 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Mortimer(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1398년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Elizabeth de Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1408년 12월 19일 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.23 April 1371–19 December 1408: 23 de abril de 1371–19 de dezembro de 1408
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Touchet Lord Audley nasceu em 23 de abril de 1371, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Mortimer, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Stafford em 1398, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de dezembro de 1408, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Touchet Lord Audley родился 23 апреля 1371 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margery de Mortimer, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Stafford в 1398 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 декабря 1408 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.23 April 1371–19 December 1408: 23 de abril de 1371–19 de diciembre de 1408
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Touchet Lord Audley nació el 23 de abril de 1371, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Touchet Baron of Audley, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margery de Mortimer, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Stafford en 1398, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de diciembre de 1408, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
